title: MatterBridgeShadows
description: Strict JSON Schemas for AWS IoT reported shadows produced by the matter-bridge Greengrass component. Generated from Pydantic RootModel schemas in src/shadows/models.py; do not edit by hand. Matter attribute values may also be the literal string 'n/a' (sentinel for 'not available'). Attribute 65529 (AcceptedCommandList) is encoded as a JSON array of integers regardless of the cluster.
